mnemonics: F.A.S.T. Search: Forms, Autocomplete, Suggestions, Two-dimensional (results & features)
keyPoints: Modern interfaces use query autocompletion and suggestions to guide users
Results are presented with rich snippets (images, ratings, summaries) for quick scanning
Search is now ubiquitous, integrated into voice assistants, apps, and websites beyond traditional engines
commonMistakes: Assuming search is only about the query box and results page, ignoring the entire user journey
Overlooking the importance of mobile-first and voice-search optimized interfaces
Focusing solely on textual results and ignoring the power of visual and multimedia elements in snippets
